summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All five hydrated PRs are open, non-security per the preflight artifact, and should remain open for normal maintainer review rather than closure.

actions.reason: Independent open feature PR with useful code and no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical; closure is not justified in this inventory shard.
